Evin J — Resume

Summary
Senior product engineer with 8 years experience across consumer and developer tooling. Built PriceX, a price-comparison website; scaled Natively to 10k users in the first 90 days.

Experience
- Founder, Natively (2025–present). Live-meeting copilot. Scaled to 10k users.
- Founder, PriceX (2022–2024). Price-comparison website covering 14 retailers; sold to a strategic acquirer.
- Senior engineer, Wilson & Kinsman (2018–2022). Owned the order-management subsystem.

Education
- B.Tech, Computer Science (2014–2018).

Notable projects
- Open-source CLI for streaming STT benchmarks.
